T0052.title: Grocery Card
T0052.definition: A credit or debit card widely used for small-value purchases, such as groceries, to disguise illegal cash-out schemes or other fraudulent activities. These cards are often obtained through illicit means or fraudulent applications and are used to conduct sham transactions or other forms of fraud.
T0052.description: The term "grocery card" originates from its use in small-value purchases, such as groceries, to conceal the true purpose of illegal transactions. In these cases, fraudsters may collude with merchants to fabricate purchase records and facilitate cash-outs.
T0052.usageExample: 他手里那批买菜卡每天在便利店刷几十笔，每笔几十块，用来把电诈的钱洗白。
